passiveAbilities.name: Flail
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to W. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg increase the Dmg dealt by +2. If this character plays a High Guard or Low Guard during Melee then it suffers 2 Wds during the End Step.

passiveAbilities.name: Egged-On
passiveAbilities.description: This character gains +1 Melee Stat for each other friendly Cultist within 6".

passiveAbilities.name: Kinship [Raegan, Leshavult Priestess]
passiveAbilities.description: If the friendly named character is within 6" during the Replenish Step, this character gains [Protection: The first time this character would suffer Dmg each turn, reduce that Dmg to W], until end of turn.

passiveAbilities.name: Tubthumping
passiveAbilities.description: The first time this game this character is reduced to 0 health boxes remaining, flip an Arcane Card. If the result is a Catastrophe, then this character is slain, otherwise it remains in play with X health boxes remaining, where X is the value on the flipped card.

activeAbilities.name: Hold my Beer
activeAbilities.description: All characters within the Pulse suffer 1 Catastrophe printed on their card. The Klaus player chooses the catastrophe if a character has several, the targets if required and the order in which all effects occur.

signatureMove.name: Flail Around Madly
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This character suffers 1 Impact Dmg. This does not count as Melee Dmg.
